title: Hattables++
description: A resourcepack to improve on hattable items!
body:
# Hattables ++
> ### _**v2 is out! Mob eggs are now in fashion!**_

Many servers allow for the use of hattable items through the use of /hat or similar.
Some items, such as bones and end rods, have unique displays when on the head, however most items do not.

This pack is meant to eventually make **every** item in the game more interesting than in vanilla.



_Most importantly! This pack is 100% vanilla. No optifine or CIT resewn features required._

![Left is vanilla, Right is with hattables++](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c9f46cb3fe7ac0fa9b3f65adbae68b96edbd85.png)
![You can now wear any mob!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b93c2952adfe838af0efe8bd1d85c520423085d_0.webp)

_If you have any issues, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/wDE9TBwwdN) for support!_
